testcase.name: test_signup_with_valid_credentials
testcase.failure:
tests\test_registration.py:118: in test_signup_with_valid_credentials logger.info(f" Password: {'*' * len(env['email'])}") ^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'email'
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: tests\test_registration.py:133: in test_signup_with_valid_credentials raise AssertionError(f"Scenario 3 failed: {str(e)}") from e E AssertionError: Scenario 3 failed: 'email'
